core_payload.content:
# Vault Stewardship Swarm Inventory Pressure

## 1. Role
Vault Stewardship Swarm Inventory Pressure owns the reading and pressure-sensing surface of stewardship. It continuously surveys the vault, identifies weak neighborhoods, and turns subtle structural drift into explicit maintenance pressure before any job packet is proposed.

## 2. Inventory Pressure Surface
This sub-hub groups `capsule-librarian-agent`, `agent-context-engineering`, and `deepmine`. Together they define how stewardship reads the vault, frames high-signal context, and reaches for deeper research only when gap pressure or ambiguity requires more evidence than local memory already provides.

## 3. Operating Boundary
This sub-hub does not own review decisions, branch routing, validation handoff, or mutation execution. Those belong to `work-planning-review` and `mutation-workers`, while runtime posture belongs to `runtime-modes`.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Vault Stewardship Swarm Inventory Pressure groups the reading and pressure-sensing surfaces of stewardship: Capsule Librarian, Agent Context Engineering, and DeepMine. It keeps vault survey work, gap sensing, and deeper evidence gathering together so weak summaries, stale overlays, bloated hubs, and missing context become explicit maintenance pressure before any mutation packet is proposed. This boundary matters because stewardship quality depends on reading the vault well before it tries to fix the vault quickly.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Minted during Dream Vault Stewardship Swarm decomposition to isolate vault reading, gap sensing, and research pressure from review, mutation, and runtime control.
